title: Verify 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event
description: Test that the widget viewed event is fired correctly when the user sees any variant of the widget.
preconditions: User is eligible for Trial Corner

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the homepage where the widget is visible.

expected_result: The 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is fired with the correct 'which varient' attribute (e.g., 'home-trial-active').
